name: Headless WordPress Frontend - NextJs Application
description: Developed using Next.js and React.js, paired with TypeScript, acting as a frontend for a wordpress blog./Utilized Graphql to get the data from the wordpress blog./The repository is private because the project is in use by the client.

name: Dictionary - NextJs Application
description: Developed using Next.js and React.js, paired with TypeScript,, acting as an interactive dictionary for informal expressions./Utilized Supabase for efficient backend operations including user authentication and database management./The repository is a alpha version of  the aplication. The last version(which can be seen in the demo) is private because it will be used by the client.

name: To-do List - NextJs Application
description: Developed using Next.js and React.js, acting as a todo list for users./Utilized Supabase for efficient backend operations including user authentication and database management.
